title: Section 11
content: 1* * * If any Director of the said Association shall cease to be a Director, otherwise than by the operation of the rule of rotation aforesaid, the Directors of the said Association shall, with all convenient speed after such public notice as is hereinafter directed, call an extraordinary general meeting of the proprietors for the purpose of choosing a successor and such successor shall come into the same place in the rotation aforesaid in which the Director whom he has succeeded was.
footnote: 1. The words “And it is hereby enacted, that” omitted by Act 12 of 1891, s. 2 and Sch. I.
